assessor_raw:
## Baseline Assessment (Run 2): Session-Sequence Ranker vs. Baseline

IPW-corrected AUROC as primary metric for a ranking task is the main concern. NDCG@10 is the appropriate primary metric for measuring ranking quality per query. The AUROC justification (stable across strata, handles label sparsity) is pragmatic but does not make AUROC the right primary metric when the operational objective is ordered list quality per search query.
